# NOTICE OF TERMINATION

**Residential Tenancies Act 2004 (as amended)**

To: Aoife Byrne
From: Landlord — Declan Murphy

## Tenancy details

| Field | Detail |
| --- | --- |
| Rented dwelling | 14 Oakwood Grove, Dublin 9, D09 X2Y4 |
| Tenancy commenced | 1 March 2021 |
| RTB registration no. | RT2021/384756 |
| Monthly rent | €1,450 |

Dear Tenant,

The landlord intends to sell the property within the next three months and is therefore terminating your tenancy under section 34 of the Act.

**You are required to vacate the property within 14 days of the date of this notice.**

The termination date is therefore **5 July 2026**. Any rent arrears must be discharged before you vacate.

Please confirm in writing whether you intend to comply with this notice, and provide a forwarding address for the return of your deposit.

Date of this notice: 21 June 2026

Signed: _Declan Murphy_ (Landlord)
